meta.composition: professional vs professional (levyVsProfessional grid: pure levy attacker, open field)
meta.tacticCardSets: attVeterans/attCondottieri/defLockedShields/bribedGatekeeperT3 encode RATIFIED canon §7.7 cards at final magnitudes

openField.description: no modifiers (plains, no walls, no cards)

riverCrossing.description: attacking across a strait / amphibiously: attacker -1 (threshold space)

wall1.description: direct assault on intact T1 walls (defender +1, escalade -1)

wall2.description: direct assault on intact T2 walls (defender +2, escalade -1)

wall3.description: direct assault on intact T3 walls (defender +3, escalade -1)

wall4.description: direct assault on intact T4 walls (defender +4, escalade -1)

wall5.description: direct assault on intact T5 walls (defender +4, escalade -1) — the Theodosian Walls

attVeterans.description: attacker plays Veterans of the Border (ratified median combat card: +1 die per melee round)

attCondottieri.description: attacker plays Condottieri Contract (strongest ratified dice card: +2 dice per melee round, 2 gold)

defLockedShields.description: defender plays Locked Shields (ratified: reroll 1 missed die per melee round on defense)

bribedGatekeeperT3.description: assault on intact T3 walls with The Bribed Gatekeeper (ratified: wall bonus 0; escalade -1 still applies)

levyVsProfessional.description: pure levy attacker vs professional defender, open field (quality gap)

janissaryVsVarangian.description: Ottoman professionals (Janissary 3/3) attack Byzantine professionals (Varangian Guard 2/4), open field — faction CV asymmetry
